title: Live: Wong confirms first flight from Dubai to Sydney scheduled for this morning
description: Foreign Minister Penny Wong has revealed the first flight from Dubai to Sydney could depart this morning if the airspace remains safe. Follow live.

title: Search ends, no trace of 4-year-old boy who fell into Ganga canal
Professor's case suing K-State for discrimination on the basis of sex moves forward in part
description: A trans professor is suing K-State for more than $300,000 because he says the university discriminated against him because of his gender identity and sex. A United States District Court Judge ordered on Feb. 25 the case move forward, in...
